title: Christmas Spirit
description: The aim of this mod pack is to make you feel the Christmas spirit even more!
body:
![Christmas Spirit Big Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfc673ed25e984c1bcd8dda4d2cff0f5ac6144c8.png)**🎄 Christmas Spirit Modpack 🎅**

**_Currently working on CurseForge port!_**

_Get ready to feel the true magic of Christmas like never before!
This modpack is all about bringing the cozy, joyful, and snowy atmosphere of the holidays straight into your game. From festive decorations and snowy landscapes to cheerful music and warm lights — every detail is made to make you feel like it’s Christmas Eve every day._

_Light up your world with Christmas trees, build snowy villages, share gifts with friends, and let the festive vibes take over. Whether you’re decorating your base or just relaxing by the fireplace, this pack will wrap you in pure holiday spirit._

**Features:**

_✨ Beautiful winter biomes & snowy weather_

_🎁 Christmas decorations, gifts, and festive blocks_

_🕯️ Cozy lights, fireplaces, and cheerful ambience_

_🎶 Holiday sounds and music to set the mood_

**_So grab your hot cocoa, put on your Santa hat, and dive into the Christmas magic!_**
